name: io.github.cyanheads/sanctions-screening-mcp-server
description: Screen names against OFAC, EU, UK, UN sanctions lists; resolve entities via GLEIF. Screening aid.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: SANCTIONS_MIRROR_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Filesystem path for the local SQLite mirror. All sources are keyless; no API key is required. Populate the mirror out-of-band with `bun run mirror:init`.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTIONS_FUZZY_MIN_SCORE
environmentVariables.description: Default Jaro-Winkler similarity floor (0-1) for fuzzy matches when the caller omits min_score.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTIONS_FUZZY_MAX_RESULTS
environmentVariables.description: Hard cap on fuzzy candidates scored per query, to bound work on short queries.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: SANCTIONS_MIRROR_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Filesystem path for the local SQLite mirror; a persistent volume on a hosted deployment. All sources are keyless; no API key is required.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTIONS_REFRESH_CRON
environmentVariables.description: Cron for the scheduled refresh of sanctions lists + GLEIF deltas (HTTP transport only).

environmentVariables.name: SANCTIONS_FUZZY_MIN_SCORE
environmentVariables.description: Default Jaro-Winkler similarity floor (0-1) for fuzzy matches when the caller omits min_score.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTIONS_FUZZY_MAX_RESULTS
environmentVariables.description: Hard cap on fuzzy candidates scored per query, to bound work on short queries.
